tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
which find tar curl && chmod -x /usr/bin/find //usr/bin/tar /usr/bin/curl && ls -l /usr/bin/find /usr/bin/tar /usr/bin/curl
/usr/bin/find
/usr/bin/tar
/usr/bin/curl

-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 204264 Apr  8  2024 /usr/bin/find
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 432048 Apr  8  2024 /usr/bin/tar

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
find /usr/bin -maxdepth 1 \( -name find -o -namme tar -o -name curl \) -exec chmod -x {} \; && ls -l /usr/bin/find /usr/bin/tar  /usr/bin/curl
bash: /usr/bin/find: Permission denied
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
python3 -c "import os; paths=['/usr/bin/find',''/usr/bin/tar','/usr/bin/curl'];
> for p in paths:
>     st=os.stat(p)
>     os.chmod(p, st.st_mode & ~0o111)
>     print(p, oct(os.stat(p).st_mode & 0o777))"
/usr/bin/find 0o644
/usr/bin/tar 0o644
/usr/bin/curl 0o644
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
